license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdhki34w
title: Crosslinking Immunoprecipitation Beads
author: Bryon Drown

steps_raw.instruction: Form complex with beads and antibody
Add 900 uL Binding Buffer and 100 uL magnetic beads to 1.5 mL LoBind tube.
Collect beads with magnet and resuspend with 900 uL Binding Buffer. DynaMag-2 (Magnet, Invitrogen, 12321D, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12321D#/12321D )
Incubate overnight with rotation. Tube Rovolver (Fisher, 88861051, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/88881001#/88881001 ) 4 °C Overnight
Prepare fresh triethanolamine and ethanolamine buffers. DMP should be added to Crosslinking Buffer immediately before use.
Collect beads with magnet and remove supernatant. Wash beads with 1 mL TEA Wash Buffer.
Resuspend beads with 1 mL Crosslinking Buffer and incubate at ambient temperature for 1 hr while rotating. 01:00:00 Room temperature

Collect beads with magnet and immediately wash beads with 1 mL Quenching Buffer. Resuspend beads in 1 mL Quenching Buffer and incubate at ambient temperature for 15 min while rotating. 00:15:00 Room temperature
Collect beads with magnet and wash beads with 1 mL TEA Wash Buffer, 1 mL Basic Elution Buffer, 1 mL Acidic Elution Buffer, and 1 mL TBS twice.
Store beads in 1 mL Storage Buffer at 4 °C
